posts.author: manriqm (Mariela Manriquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love to have the dashboard filter functionality on PC also available within the mobile monday.com app. Reporting on the go with filter functionality is a must.

What are you trying to achieve

Reporting flexibility for executives/sales team members on the go.
